stemHtml: You hear the beginning of a distress message from another aircraft to ATS. What should you do immediately?

options.a: Stop transmitting, note the message, and listen to confirm assistance is being provided.
options.b: Transmit to the distress aircraft with your position and offer help.
options.c: Leave the frequency and call ATS on another frequency.
options.d: Transmit to ATS with your position and offer assistance.
